top_signals.title: Indian Rupee Rises Most in Asia on Central Bank Intervention
top_signals.summary: India’s rupee advanced the most in Asia after the central bank intervened and as policymakers are said to be considering options, including an interest-rate hike, to defend the currency.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: JSW Motors Ties Up $826 Million Funding From India’s Top Bank
top_signals.summary: Billionaire Sajjan Jindal’s automotive business has secured about 80 billion rupees ($826 million) funding line from India’s largest lender, keeping its plans for a new energy vehicle venture on track.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
